case_title: NATALI, DENNIS B. vs. U-HAUL et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NATALI, DENNIS B. AS TO DEFENDANT U-HAUL POSILLICO, WENDY DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAR-16-1995 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-17-1995 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       FEB-24-1995
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT U-HAUL

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAR-16-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON MAR-16-1995, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR APR-17-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF APR-17-1995, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $50.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON APR-17-1995, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), OSC WHY FURTHER SANCTIONS SHOULD NOT BE IMPOSED, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAY-17-1995 CONTINUED FROM APR-17-1995 TO MAY-17-1995 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
OSC CALENDAR OF MAY-17-1995, CONTINUED TO AUG-14-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR A DISMISSAL/PROOF OF SERVICE OR ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE WHY CASE SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED PER CRC 525. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF NATALI, DENNIS B.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
